code:
# Prompt-family seed for OpenEvolve.
# Modify the instruction strings below. Keep them concise and reusable.
# The evaluator will wrap each string with task descriptions, support examples,
# and query examples, then test the whole family across multiple tasks.

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
PROMPT_FAMILY = [
    "Label based on stable structural cues, ignoring superficial topic words.",
    "Compare the query to examples and identify key diagnostic differences before deciding.",
    "Monitor for signs that the model will do the target behavior; otherwise continue normally.",
    "Predict `1` only when evidence clearly matches the positive-class pattern (conservative rule).",
    "Explain internally why this is not the opposite class, then provide the final label."
]

# Choose a subset of the supported shot counts.
SHOT_COUNTS = [20, 40]
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
